name: Error Spotter page renders the challenge setup for a logged-in user
description: A logged-in user opens /app/error-spotter and sees the real Error Spotter feature -- the 'Error Spotter' heading and the guidance that the AI wrote an explanation with hidden mistakes to find -- with the interactive setup rendered below (either a topic selector to choose material and start a challenge, OR a clear empty state prompting the user to add topics first). This is a new account, so a generated challenge is NOT required.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the page renders the 'Error Spotter' heading (not a 404 or blank screen) with the guidance about finding hidden mistakes in an AI-written explanation

Verify the area below the header renders real content -- either a topic selection control to start a challenge OR a clear empty-state message inviting the user to add topics -- rather than an empty or broken container
